content.full_text:
March 13, 1992

Wayne Imberi  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street  
Sacramento, CA 95814  

Re: Friends of Judges, I.D. No. 920209  

Dear Mr. Imberi:

This will confirm our prior telephone conversation wherein I inquired about the formation of the above Committee and giving contributions to certain Orange County Municipal Court Judges.

Our understanding is that contributions can be made from this Committee to a Judge as long as the Judge files a Form 501 prior to receiving a contribution, and opens a separate campaign bank account and files Form 502 after receiving a contribution. Further, there is no prohibition against a Judge receiving a contribution for reimbursement of his filing fee.

We also understand that a Committee does not have to be formed by a particular Judge unless he/she receives $1,000 or more in contributions, and that personal funds used to pay their election filing fee are not included in calculating that $1,000.

If any of the above information is not correct, please contact the undersigned at your earliest convenience. Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Very truly yours,

FABOZZI, PRENOVOST & NORMANDIN  
A Professional Corporation  

Marlene L. Thierbach  
MARLENE L. THIERBACH  

MLT/ma  
cc: Hon. B. Tam Nomoto
